enrichment.short_description: Agentic AI revenue orchestration platform for prospecting, deal management, forecasting, and coaching.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Outreach is an agentic AI revenue orchestration platform for prospecting, deal management, forecasting, coaching, and account expansion.

features.title: AI sales agents
features.description: AI agents work every deal and account for every rep simultaneously across the sales cycle.

features.title: Outreach Omni
features.description: A universal conversational agent for asking questions across accounts and opportunities.

features.title: Agent Studio
features.description: A visual canvas for configuring intelligent workflow automation.

features.title: Meeting Prep Agent
features.description: Generates automated briefings covering account history, recent activity, and open opportunities.

features.title: Conversation intelligence
features.description: AI analysis of sales conversations at scale to surface coaching opportunities and performance patterns.

features.title: Forecasting tools
features.description: AI-assisted forecast modeling that validates calls and compares outcomes.

features.title: Knowledge base
features.description: Teams can upload case studies, white papers, and competitive battlecards for agents to reference.

features.title: Outreach MCP
features.description: Lets information and actions flow across a company's go-to-market tech stack.

pros: Broad platform covering prospecting, deal management, forecasting, and coaching in one system
Used by large, well-known enterprises including Zoom, Snowflake, ServiceNow, and Okta
Reports helping sellers close over 2 million opportunities every month
AI agents and MCP support for connecting to a broader GTM stack
cons: Pricing is not published and requires contacting sales
Positioned toward larger revenue teams, which may be more than small sales teams need
Full agentic feature set likely requires onboarding and setup investment

faqs.question: What is Outreach?
faqs.answer: Outreach is an agentic AI revenue orchestration platform for prospecting, managing deals, forecasting, coaching, and expanding accounts.

faqs.question: Who uses Outreach?
faqs.answer: Sales, marketing, RevOps, and customer success teams at companies including Zoom, Snowflake, ServiceNow, and Okta use Outreach.

faqs.question: Does Outreach publish its pricing?
faqs.answer: No, Outreach does not publish pricing on its website; prospective customers must request pricing information.

faqs.question: When was Outreach founded?
faqs.answer: Outreach was founded in 2014.

use_cases.title: Sales prospecting automation
use_cases.description: AI agents help reps prioritize and work accounts and deals at scale.
use_cases.audience: Sales development and account executive teams

use_cases.title: Revenue forecasting
use_cases.description: AI-assisted forecast modeling compares calls and outcomes to improve forecast accuracy.

use_cases.title: Rep coaching
use_cases.description: Conversation intelligence surfaces coaching opportunities from sales calls at scale.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Outreach?
paragraphs: Outreach is an agentic AI revenue orchestration platform built for prospecting, managing deals, forecasting, coaching reps, and expanding accounts. It brings AI agents such as Outreach Omni and Agent Studio into the sales workflow to work deals and accounts alongside sales reps.

The platform includes conversation intelligence for surfacing coaching opportunities, forecasting tools for validating pipeline, and an MCP integration layer for connecting Outreach to the rest of a company's go-to-market tech stack.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Outreach is for
paragraphs: Outreach is built for sales, marketing, RevOps, and customer success teams at companies that need a single platform for prospecting, deal management, forecasting, and coaching. Its customer base includes large enterprises such as Zoom, Snowflake, ServiceNow, and Okta.

enrichment.short_description: Cold outreach platform for multi-channel email and LinkedIn campaigns with deliverability monitoring.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: QuickMail runs multi-channel cold email and LinkedIn campaigns with deliverability monitoring, inbox rotation, and CRM sync. Plans start at $49/month.

features.title: Multi-channel campaigns
features.description: Combine email and LinkedIn connection automation in the same outreach sequence, with ICP filtering.

features.title: Deliverability monitoring
features.description: Includes email warming, sender rotation, and blacklist monitoring to protect sending reputation.

features.title: Inbox Rotation
features.description: QuickMail's Inbox Rotation technology distributes sends across multiple mailboxes.

features.title: Unified inbox
features.description: Manage email and LinkedIn replies from a single unified inbox.

features.title: Reword with AI
features.description: An AI feature to rewrite outreach message copy.

features.title: CRM sync
features.description: Native two-way sync with HubSpot and Pipedrive, plus Zapier and API access.

features.title: Campaign analytics
features.description: Advanced analytics and automated deliverability insights for tracking campaign performance.

pros: Combines email and LinkedIn outreach in one platform
Built-in deliverability tools like email warming, sender rotation, and blacklist monitoring
Native two-way sync with HubSpot and Pipedrive
14-day free trial with no automatic charge after it ends
Won G2 Best Estimated ROI and High Performer badges in Spring 2024
cons: Entry plan caps uploaded contacts at 1,000 and emails sent at 5,000/month
API and webhook access are reserved for higher-tier Growth and Agency plans
Additional workspaces on the Agency plan cost extra per workspace

faqs.question: What is QuickMail?
faqs.answer: QuickMail is a cold outreach platform for running multi-channel email and LinkedIn campaigns to generate leads.

faqs.question: How much does QuickMail cost?
faqs.answer: QuickMail's Starter plan is $49/month, Growth is $99/month, and Agency is $299/month, each with a 14-day free trial.

faqs.question: Does QuickMail integrate with a CRM?
faqs.answer: Yes, QuickMail has native two-way sync with HubSpot and Pipedrive, plus Zapier and API access on higher plans.

faqs.question: When was QuickMail founded?
faqs.answer: QuickMail states it has operated since 2014.

use_cases.title: Cold email outreach
use_cases.description: Run multi-channel email and LinkedIn campaigns with automated sender rotation and warming.
use_cases.audience: B2B sales and demand generation teams

use_cases.title: Lead generation for agencies
use_cases.description: Manage multiple client workspaces and outreach campaigns from one account.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is QuickMail?
paragraphs: QuickMail is a cold outreach platform that lets sales and growth teams run multi-channel campaigns combining email and LinkedIn. It includes deliverability tools like email warming, sender rotation, and blacklist monitoring, along with an Inbox Rotation feature and a unified inbox for replies.
The platform syncs natively with HubSpot and Pipedrive and offers Zapier, webhook, and API access on higher-tier plans for connecting outreach data to other tools.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who QuickMail is for
paragraphs: QuickMail is aimed at B2B sales teams, demand generation professionals, and lead generation agencies that need to scale outbound email and LinkedIn outreach while protecting sender deliverability.

enrichment.short_description: Sales engagement platform for small teams to prospect, automate outreach, and sync with a CRM.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: PersistIQ is a sales engagement platform for small teams, combining LinkedIn prospecting, automated email campaigns, and CRM sync.

features.title: Chrome extension prospecting
features.description: Build prospect lists from LinkedIn and LinkedIn Sales Navigator, with email finding and automatic campaign addition.

features.title: Automated campaigns
features.description: Automate personalized emails, calls, and tasks to accelerate the sales pipeline, with A/B testing of messages.

features.title: CRM sync
features.description: Native bi-directional sync integrations with Salesforce and Copper for contact records and activities.

features.title: Sales Email AI
features.description: An AI tool for generating sales email content.

features.title: Performance reporting
features.description: Tracks tasks completed, replies, reply sentiment, and meetings booked.

pros: Chrome extension pulls prospects directly from LinkedIn and Sales Navigator
Native bi-directional CRM sync with Salesforce and Copper
A/B testing built into campaign messaging
14-day free trial available
cons: Public pricing details are not published on the marketing site
CRM sync is limited to Salesforce and Copper, not other major CRMs
Positioned specifically for small teams, which may limit fit for larger sales orgs

faqs.question: What is PersistIQ?
faqs.answer: PersistIQ is a sales engagement platform for small teams to find prospects, automate outreach, and sync activity with a CRM.

faqs.question: Does PersistIQ have a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, PersistIQ offers a 14-day free trial.

faqs.question: Which CRMs does PersistIQ integrate with?
faqs.answer: PersistIQ offers native bi-directional sync with Salesforce and Copper.

faqs.question: Is PersistIQ part of a larger company?
faqs.answer: PersistIQ operates as a subsidiary of Wishpond.

use_cases.title: LinkedIn prospecting
use_cases.description: Build prospect lists from LinkedIn and Sales Navigator using the Chrome extension and add them directly to campaigns.

use_cases.title: Multi-touch outreach automation
use_cases.description: Automate sequences of personalized emails, calls, and tasks with A/B tested messaging.
use_cases.audience: Account executives and sales managers on small teams

long_form_blocks.heading: What is PersistIQ?
paragraphs: PersistIQ is a sales engagement platform built for small sales teams. It combines a Chrome extension for finding prospects on LinkedIn with automated multi-channel campaigns that mix personalized emails, calls, and tasks.
The platform syncs bi-directionally with Salesforce and Copper and includes reporting on tasks completed, replies, reply sentiment, and meetings booked, plus an AI tool for drafting sales emails.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who PersistIQ is for
paragraphs: PersistIQ markets itself to account executives, sales managers, and SDRs on small, growing sales teams who need to prospect on LinkedIn and automate outreach without a heavyweight platform.

enrichment.short_description: Contact intelligence tool that finds verified emails and phone numbers for 350 million professionals.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: ContactOut finds verified emails and phone numbers for 350 million professionals via a Chrome extension, search portal, and API.

features.title: Professional contact search
features.description: Search a database of 350 million professionals across 40 million companies for verified email addresses and phone numbers.

features.title: Chrome extension
features.description: Finds email and phone numbers for professional profiles directly while browsing, including on LinkedIn.

features.title: AI Personalizer
features.description: Generates personalized outreach emails, which ContactOut says can increase response rates.

features.title: Email campaigns
features.description: Multi-stage outreach campaigns with personalization built on top of found contact data.

features.title: Data enrichment
features.description: Over 20 searchable data points including job titles, revenue, skills, locations, company size, and technologies used.

features.title: API access
features.description: Programmatic access to ContactOut's email, phone, and company records.

features.title: Cloud phone dialer
features.description: A built-in dialer for calling found phone numbers.

pros: Free tier gives 5 free credits daily with no credit card required
Large claimed database of 350 million professionals and 40 million companies
SOC 2 certified and states CCPA and GDPR compliance
Chrome extension has a 4.4-star rating on the Chrome Web Store
4.6-star rating on G2
cons: Full pricing tiers are not clearly broken out on the public pricing page
Contact data accuracy for any individual record can vary despite stated verification claims
Advanced features like team management and dedicated account managers are limited to higher tiers

faqs.question: What is ContactOut?
faqs.answer: ContactOut is a contact intelligence tool that finds verified email addresses and phone numbers for professionals.

faqs.question: Does ContactOut have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, ContactOut offers 5 free credits daily with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How does ContactOut find contact data?
faqs.answer: ContactOut searches a database it states covers 350 million professionals across 40 million companies, accessible via a Chrome extension, web search portal, and API.

faqs.question: Is ContactOut compliant with data privacy regulations?
faqs.answer: ContactOut states it is CCPA and GDPR compliant and SOC 2 certified.

use_cases.title: Recruiting sourcing
use_cases.description: Find verified contact details for candidates sourced from LinkedIn and other professional profiles.

use_cases.title: Sales prospecting
use_cases.description: Build prospect lists with verified emails and phone numbers, then run personalized outreach campaigns.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ContactOut?
paragraphs: ContactOut is a contact intelligence platform that helps recruiters and sales professionals find and verify email addresses and phone numbers. It states its database covers 350 million professionals across 40 million companies, accessible through a Chrome extension, a web search portal, and an API.
The platform also includes an AI Personalizer for drafting outreach emails, multi-stage email campaigns, and a cloud phone dialer for calling found numbers.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who ContactOut is for
paragraphs: ContactOut is built for recruiters and sales representatives who need to find verified contact details for people they discover on LinkedIn and elsewhere, then reach out directly by email or phone.

enrichment.short_description: GDPR-compliant B2B email finder and data enrichment tool that cleans and deduplicates CRM contacts.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Dropcontact finds and verifies GDPR-compliant B2B emails, enriches contact records, and cleans duplicates. Plans start at €79/month.

features.title: Email finder
features.description: Finds a GDPR-compliant, verified nominative email address from a website domain, first name, and last name.

features.title: Data enrichment
features.description: Adds LinkedIn profile URLs, company websites, company size, industry, and French SIREN codes to contact records.

features.title: Email verification
features.description: Validates B2B emails, including catch-all domain verification, with a stated 98% valid rate.

features.title: Duplicate detection
features.description: Automatically identifies and merges duplicate contact records.

features.title: Company change detection
features.description: Detects when a contact changes companies and updates the record automatically.

features.title: Data cleaning
features.description: Corrects name order, fixes spelling, and removes harmful characters from contact data.

features.title: CRM integrations
features.description: Native integrations with Pipedrive and HubSpot, plus 1,200+ tools via Zapier, Make, and n8n.

pros: States 100% GDPR compliance using proprietary algorithms rather than personal data resale
Native integrations with Pipedrive and HubSpot, plus broad no-code connector support
Free trial with 50 emails to test before paying
Yearly billing offers a 20% discount
G2 Winter Medal, Easy to Use Medal, and High Performer EMEA recognition
cons: Salesforce and Zoho integrations are listed as coming, not yet native
Growth-plan features like LinkedIn enrichment are not included on the Starter plan
Enterprise pricing requires a minimum of 200,000 credits per month

faqs.question: What is Dropcontact?
faqs.answer: Dropcontact is a B2B contact data enrichment and cleaning tool that finds and verifies emails, deduplicates records, and updates contact information.

faqs.question: How much does Dropcontact cost?
faqs.answer: Dropcontact's Starter plan is €79/month and its Growth plan is €120/month, both for 500 credits/month, with a 20% discount for yearly billing.

faqs.question: Is Dropcontact GDPR compliant?
faqs.answer: Dropcontact states it is 100% GDPR compliant, using proprietary algorithms instead of personal databases that require consent.

faqs.question: Does Dropcontact have a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, Dropcontact offers 50 free emails to try before subscribing.

use_cases.title: CRM data cleaning
use_cases.description: Automatically detect and merge duplicate contacts and correct malformed contact data in a CRM.

use_cases.title: B2B email finding
use_cases.description: Find and verify professional email addresses from a name and company website for outbound campaigns.
use_cases.audience: Sales and marketing teams doing lead generation

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Dropcontact?
paragraphs: Dropcontact is a B2B contact data enrichment and cleaning platform. From a website domain, first name, and last name, it finds and verifies a nominative email address, then enriches the record with details like LinkedIn profile, company size, industry, and French SIREN codes.

The platform also cleans existing CRM data by correcting name formatting, removing duplicate records, and detecting when a contact changes companies. It integrates natively with Pipedrive and HubSpot, and connects to over 1,200 other tools via Zapier, Make, and n8n.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Dropcontact is for
paragraphs: Dropcontact is aimed at sales and marketing teams that need GDPR-compliant B2B contact data and want to keep CRM records clean and deduplicated, particularly teams operating in or selling into Europe.

enrichment.short_description: Waterfall contact enrichment tool that aggregates 20+ data sources to find verified emails and phone numbers.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: FullEnrich waterfalls 20+ data providers to find and verify B2B emails and phone numbers, with a free 50-lead trial and plans from €55/month.

features.title: Waterfall enrichment
features.description: Aggregates data from 20+ premium providers including Clearbit, Hunter, Wiza, Snov, ContactOut, Anymail Finder, and Crunchbase to maximize find rates.

features.title: Phone validation
features.description: Advanced phone validation compares number ownership with lead names for US and Canada contacts.

features.title: Catch-all email verification
features.description: Verifies catch-all domain emails, claimed at up to 80% accuracy.

features.title: CRM sync
features.description: Syncs enrichment data with HubSpot and Salesforce.

features.title: AI agent integrations
features.description: Connects to Claude via MCP and to OpenAI-based workflows, as well as Zapier, Make, n8n, and Clay.

features.title: API access
features.description: Programmatic access to waterfall enrichment for building custom workflows.

pros: Free trial with 50 leads and no credit card required
Aggregates multiple third-party data providers in a single waterfall rather than relying on one source
Claims a bounce rate under 1% on delivered emails
MCP support for connecting directly to Claude
4.8/5 rating on G2
cons: Find rates vary meaningfully by region (77% in US/Canada versus 71-84% elsewhere)
Enterprise-level volume and custom features require contacting sales
Relies on third-party data vendors, so results depend on those providers' underlying coverage

faqs.question: What is FullEnrich?
faqs.answer: FullEnrich is a B2B contact enrichment platform that waterfalls over 20 data providers to find and verify email addresses and phone numbers.

faqs.question: How much does FullEnrich cost?
faqs.answer: FullEnrich's Pro plan is €55/month for 1,000 credits, with a free trial of 50 credits and no credit card required.

faqs.question: Does FullEnrich integrate with AI agents?
faqs.answer: Yes, FullEnrich supports Claude via MCP and OpenAI-based workflows, in addition to Zapier, Make, n8n, and Clay.

faqs.question: Is FullEnrich compliant with data regulations?
faqs.answer: FullEnrich states it is SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR and CCPA compliant.

use_cases.title: Outbound list building
use_cases.description: Enrich lists of prospects matching an ideal customer profile with verified work emails and mobile numbers.

use_cases.title: AI agent-driven enrichment
use_cases.description: Call FullEnrich's waterfall enrichment directly from Claude or other AI agents via MCP.
use_cases.audience: Revenue operations teams building AI workflows

features: Work, mobile, and personal email enrichment

long_form_blocks.heading: What is FullEnrich?
paragraphs: FullEnrich is a B2B contact enrichment platform that runs a waterfall across more than 20 premium data providers, including Clearbit, Hunter, Wiza, Snov, ContactOut, Anymail Finder, and Crunchbase, to find and verify work emails, mobile numbers, and personal emails.

It includes phone validation that compares number ownership against lead names, catch-all email verification, and API and MCP access for connecting enrichment directly into CRMs or AI agent workflows.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who FullEnrich is for
paragraphs: FullEnrich serves B2B sales and outbound teams, from solo operators to enterprise sales organizations, who need higher find rates on contact data than a single enrichment provider typically delivers.

enrichment.short_description: Go-to-network platform that surfaces warm introduction paths and network signals for B2B sales teams.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Commsor is a go-to-network platform that surfaces warm intro paths, automates B2B referrals, and monitors network signals for sales teams.

features.title: Warm path discovery
features.description: Surfaces connections within investors, advisors, partners, or customers who can provide access to target accounts.

features.title: Referral automation
features.description: Builds scalable B2B referral programs with deal registration, intro boards, and tracked payouts.

features.title: Network signal monitoring
features.description: Monitors intent signals like fundraising, hiring, and posts, and shows relevant network connections tied to those events.

pros: Focuses specifically on network-sourced pipeline rather than cold outreach
Reports 2-3x higher close rates on network-sourced deals versus other pipeline
Reports 35-50% shorter sales cycles when a warm introduction is involved
cons: No public pricing page; a demo request is required to learn pricing
No details published on integrations, founding year, or headquarters
Product has repositioned around network-based sales referrals rather than community management

faqs.question: What is Commsor?
faqs.answer: Commsor is a go-to-network platform that helps B2B sales teams find warm introduction paths and automate referral programs.

faqs.question: How does Commsor pricing work?
faqs.answer: Commsor does not publish pricing; prospective customers must book a demo to get pricing information.

faqs.question: What results does Commsor claim?
faqs.answer: Commsor reports 2-3x higher close rates and 35-50% shorter sales cycles on deals sourced through warm network introductions.

use_cases.title: Warm introduction sourcing
use_cases.description: Identify which investors, advisors, partners, or customers can provide a warm path into a target account.

use_cases.title: Referral program management
use_cases.description: Run a structured referral program with deal registration and tracked payouts.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Commsor?
paragraphs: Commsor is a go-to-network platform that helps B2B sales teams use their existing relationships to generate warm introductions into target accounts. It surfaces which investors, advisors, partners, or customers have a connection to a prospect, and automates referral programs with deal registration and tracked payouts.
The platform also monitors network-related intent signals, such as a contact's company fundraising or hiring, and surfaces the relevant network connection when those signals occur.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Commsor is for
paragraphs: Commsor is built for B2B sales and go-to-market teams that want to reduce reliance on cold outreach by routing pipeline through warm, network-sourced introductions instead.

name: Orbit
skip_reason: Official website (orbit.love) returned a persistent HTTP 530 error across multiple fetch attempts, and a fetch of the parent company's Postman page returned no usable content. Could not verify current product facts firsthand.

name: Threado
skip_reason: Official website (www.threado.com and threado.com, including the pricing page) failed to load across four separate fetch attempts (connection reset). Could not verify current product facts firsthand from the official source.

name: Talkbase
skip_reason: Official website (www.talkbase.io and talkbase.io) did not resolve via DNS across multiple fetch attempts. Could not verify current product facts firsthand from the official source.
